moduleSchemas.label: Salesforce Provider
moduleSchemas.description: Authenticates to the Salesforce REST API and makes the client available to all salesforce steps.

configFields.label: Login URL
configFields.description: Salesforce login URL (e.g. https://login.salesforce.com). Defaults to https://login.salesforce.com.

configFields.label: Client ID
configFields.description: OAuth connected-app client ID. Required unless accessToken is provided.

configFields.label: Client Secret
configFields.description: OAuth connected-app client secret. Required unless accessToken is provided.

configFields.label: Access Token
configFields.description: Pre-obtained access token. Use together with instanceUrl when skipping OAuth.

configFields.label: Instance URL
configFields.description: Salesforce instance URL (e.g. https://yourorg.my.salesforce.com). Required when using accessToken.

configFields.label: API Version
configFields.description: Salesforce REST API version (e.g. v63.0). Defaults to v63.0.

stepSchemas.description: Retrieve a single Salesforce SObject record by ID.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SObject Type
configFields.description: Salesforce SObject API name (e.g. Account, Contact).

configFields.label: Record ID
configFields.description: 18-character Salesforce record ID.

outputs.description: Salesforce record ID.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Create a new Salesforce SObject record.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SObject Type
configFields.description: Salesforce SObject API name.

configFields.label: Fields
configFields.description: Map of field names to values for the new record.

outputs.description: ID of the newly created record.
Whether the record was created successfully.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Update an existing Salesforce SObject record.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SObject Type
configFields.description: Salesforce SObject API name.

configFields.label: Record ID
configFields.description: 18-character Salesforce record ID.

configFields.label: Fields
configFields.description: Map of field names to updated values.

outputs.description: True when the record was updated (204 No Content response).
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Upsert a Salesforce SObject record using an external ID field.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SObject Type
configFields.description: Salesforce SObject API name.

configFields.label: External ID Field
configFields.description: API name of the external ID field.

configFields.label: External ID Value
configFields.description: Value of the external ID field.

configFields.label: Fields
configFields.description: Map of field names to values.

outputs.description: Salesforce record ID (on create).
Whether the upsert succeeded.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Delete a Salesforce SObject record by ID.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SObject Type
configFields.description: Salesforce SObject API name.

configFields.label: Record ID
configFields.description: 18-character Salesforce record ID.

outputs.description: True when the record was deleted (204 No Content response).
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Describe the metadata of a Salesforce SObject type.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SObject Type
configFields.description: Salesforce SObject API name to describe.

outputs.description: SObject API name.
List of field descriptors.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: List all available Salesforce SObject types.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

outputs.description: List of SObject descriptors.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Execute a SOQL query against Salesforce.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SOQL Query
configFields.description: The SOQL query string to execute.

outputs.description: Array of matching records.
Total number of matching records.
Whether all records were returned.
URL to fetch the next page of results.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Execute a SOQL query that includes deleted and archived records.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SOQL Query
configFields.description: The SOQL query string to execute.

outputs.description: Array of matching records.
Total number of matching records.
Whether all records were returned.
URL to fetch the next page of results.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Execute a SOSL search query against Salesforce.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SOSL Query
configFields.description: The SOSL search string to execute.

outputs.description: Array of matching records across objects.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Insert multiple SObject records in a single Collections API request.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Records
configFields.description: Array of record objects to insert.

configFields.label: All or None
configFields.description: If true, roll back all inserts on any failure.

outputs.description: Array of per-record results.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Update multiple SObject records in a single Collections API request.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Records
configFields.description: Array of record objects (must include Id) to update.

configFields.label: All or None
configFields.description: If true, roll back all updates on any failure.

outputs.description: Array of per-record results.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Upsert multiple SObject records via the Collections API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SObject Type
configFields.description: Salesforce SObject API name.

configFields.label: External ID Field
configFields.description: API name of the external ID field.

configFields.label: Records
configFields.description: Array of record objects to upsert.

configFields.label: All or None
configFields.description: If true, roll back all upserts on any failure.

outputs.description: Array of per-record results.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Delete multiple SObject records via the Collections API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Record IDs
configFields.description: Array of Salesforce record IDs to delete.

configFields.label: All or None
configFields.description: If true, roll back all deletes on any failure.

outputs.description: Array of per-record results.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Execute a Composite API request containing multiple subrequests.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Composite Request
configFields.description: Array of subrequest objects.

configFields.label: All or None
configFields.description: If true, roll back all subrequests on any failure.

outputs.description: Array of subrequest responses.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Create a tree of related SObject records in a single Composite Tree request.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SObject Type
configFields.description: Root SObject API name.

configFields.label: Records
configFields.description: Array of root record objects with nested children.

outputs.description: Whether any record had errors.
Per-record creation results.
Error message if the request failed.

configFields.description: Salesforce SObject API name.

configFields.label: SObject Type
configFields.description: Salesforce SObject API name.

outputs.description: Bulk job ID.
Job state.

stepSchemas.description: Create a Bulk API v2 ingest job for upserting records.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SObject Type
configFields.description: Salesforce SObject API name.

configFields.label: External ID Field
configFields.description: API name of the external ID field used for upsert matching.

outputs.description: Bulk job ID.
Job state.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Create a Bulk API v2 ingest job for deleting records.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SObject Type
configFields.description: Salesforce SObject API name.

outputs.description: Bulk job ID.
Job state.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Create a Bulk API v2 query job.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: SOQL Query
configFields.description: SOQL query to execute as a bulk query job.

outputs.description: Bulk query job ID.
Job state.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Retrieve results from a completed Bulk API v2 query job.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Job ID
configFields.description: ID of the completed bulk query job.

configFields.label: Max Records
configFields.description: Maximum number of records to return.

outputs.description: Array of result records.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Get the status of a Bulk API v2 job.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Job ID
configFields.description: ID of the bulk job.

configFields.label: Job Type
configFields.description: Job type: 'ingest' (default) or 'query'.

outputs.description: Bulk job ID.
Job state (e.g. InProgress, JobComplete, Failed).
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Abort a running Bulk API v2 job.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Job ID
configFields.description: ID of the bulk job to abort.

configFields.label: Job Type
configFields.description: Job type: 'ingest' (default) or 'query'.

outputs.description: Bulk job ID.
Updated job state (Aborted).
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Submit a Salesforce record for approval.

configFields.description: Submitter comments.

outputs.description: True if the submission encountered errors.

stepSchemas.description: Post a message to a Salesforce Chatter feed.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Subject ID
configFields.description: ID of the record or user feed to post to (use 'me' for the current user).

configFields.label: Text
configFields.description: Text body of the Chatter post.

outputs.description: ID of the created feed item.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Add a comment to an existing Salesforce Chatter feed item.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Feed Element ID
configFields.description: ID of the Chatter feed element to comment on.

configFields.label: Text
configFields.description: Text body of the comment.

outputs.description: ID of the created comment.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Like a Salesforce Chatter feed item.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Feed Element ID
configFields.description: ID of the Chatter feed element to like.

outputs.description: ID of the like record.

stepSchemas.description: List Chatter feed elements for the authenticated user by feed type.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Feed Type
configFields.description: Chatter feed type (e.g. news, record, to). Defaults to 'news'.

outputs.description: Array of feed elements.
URL of the current page.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Upload a file to Salesforce as a ContentVersion.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Title
configFields.description: Title (display name) of the file.

configFields.label: Path on Client
configFields.description: Original file name including extension.

configFields.label: File Content
configFields.description: Raw file content string; the step base64-encodes it before uploading.

outputs.description: ContentVersion ID of the uploaded file.
Whether the upload succeeded.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Download a file from Salesforce by ContentVersion ID.

configFields.label: Module

configFields.label: ContentVersion ID
configFields.description: ID of the ContentVersion record to download.

outputs.description: Error message if the request failed.

configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: Fields
configFields.description: ContentVersion field values (Title, PathOnClient, VersionData, etc.).

outputs.description: ContentVersion ID.
Whether creation succeeded.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Send an arbitrary HTTP request to the Salesforce REST API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the salesforce.provider module instance.

configFields.label: HTTP Method
configFields.description: HTTP method to use (GET, POST, PATCH, PUT, DELETE). Defaults to GET.

configFields.label: Path
configFields.description: API path relative to the instance URL and API version (e.g. /sobjects/Account).

configFields.label: Request Body
configFields.description: JSON request body (for POST, PATCH, PUT).

outputs.description: Error message if the request failed.
